stories.headline: Lazarus-Linked April Hacks Cross $606M, Worst Crypto Theft Month Since Bybit
stories.tldr: Crypto protocols have lost over $606 million to exploits in 18 days, the worst month since Bybit's $1.4B breach.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: With Lazarus laundering $300M openly and DefiLlama logging an attack every 2.9 days, security risk is repricing the entire DeFi yield stack — not just individual protocols.
the_details: Drift Protocol ($285M, April 1) and KelpDAO ($292M, April 18) account for ~95% of April losses, both attributed to North Korea's Lazarus Group.
DefiLlama logs 47 incidents in the first 4.5 months of 2026 vs 28 in the same window of 2025 — a 68% YoY frequency jump.
Bloomberg reports the $300M theft attackers have already begun on-chain laundering as of April 21, complicating recovery.

stories.headline: SEC Greenlights DeFi Front-Ends, Says UI Operators Don't Need Broker Registration
stories.tldr: SEC staff said certain crypto trading user interfaces won't need broker-dealer registration, easing a key DeFi compliance overhang.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: This is the first concrete federal carve-out treating DeFi front-ends as software rather than securities intermediaries — unlocking U.S. development of permissionless trading rails.
the_details: April 13 staff statement clears software interfaces that prepare and submit transactions in crypto asset securities, subject to conditions.
Builds on the March 17 SEC-CFTC joint 68-page release that retired the 2019 staff framework and introduced a five-category token taxonomy.
Sidley Austin and Norton Rose Fulbright flagged the statement as a watershed for U.S.-onshore decentralized exchange development.

stories.headline: Spot Solana ETFs Hit $1B AUM in Days as Goldman Sachs Anchors Inflows
stories.tldr: U.S. spot SOL ETFs crossed $1 billion in assets under management as of April 25, with Goldman Sachs disclosed as a major holder.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Solana now has institutional ETF rails comparable to BTC and ETH, validating SOL as a third reserve asset for traditional allocators and pulling capital ahead of an alt-season rotation.
the_details: Spot SOL ETFs logged strong weekly inflows hitting $1B AUM by April 25, 2026 per CoinMarketCap data.
Goldman Sachs filings disclose a major position, mirroring how BlackRock anchored the BTC ETF cohort.
SOL is consolidating $77–$94 with a rare weekly chart crossover that historically precedes volatile breakouts.

stories.headline: Bitget Lists SpaceX-Linked preSPAX on Solana, Pushing Tokenized Pre-IPO Onchain
stories.tldr: Bitget rolled out tokenized pre-IPO products including a SpaceX-linked preSPAX token on Solana on April 21.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Tokenized private equity is the next RWA front, and routing it through Solana cements the chain's pitch as the on-chain Nasdaq while sidestepping public-market gatekeepers.
the_details: preSPAX gives retail synthetic exposure to SpaceX equity ahead of any public listing, settled on Solana.
Foundation's Nick Ducoff: Solana's vision of becoming the on-chain Nasdaq and home of internet capital markets is 'getting closer'.
Launch lands as DefiLlama shows SOL TVL rebuilding post-Drift, signaling appetite for new structured-finance flows.

stories.headline: Bitcoin-Dollar Correlation Hits -0.90, Most Inverse Since 2022 Macro Shock
stories.tldr: Bitcoin's 30-day correlation to the U.S. Dollar Index has deepened to -0.90, the most negative reading in nearly four years.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: BTC is trading like a pure dollar-debasement hedge again, meaning Fed policy and Warsh-era hawkish risk now dictate near-term direction more than crypto-native catalysts.
the_details: BTC up over 13% in April, holding above $77,000 and on track for its best month in a year.
DXY weakness has accompanied $2B of Bitcoin ETF inflows in 8 days through April 24, per CoinDesk.
Pentagon-backed inflation warnings and Strait of Hormuz risk capped the latest push toward $80,000 resistance.
